properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We worship You, not for the things that You do, Not for the blessings You give Though You’ve been faithful and true with mercies brand new

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But because there is in no one above You Just because You are our God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We worship You, we worship You We honor You, we honor You We worship You, simply because You are God Uncreated and holy, You are The maker of all that there is, the judge over all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We worship You, we worship You We honor You, we honor You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All blessing, all honor, all glory, all power All strength and all wisdom be unto the Lamb and unto the King All blessing, all honor, all glory, all power All strength and all wisdom be unto the Lamb and unto the King The Alpha Omega, beginning and ending Creator and ruler of all that is seen and ever will be The giver of blessings, the source of all power All wisdom is from You, let every knee bow and everyone shout
